message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.1.4

Prepare v0.1.4 release with:
- Security hardening: path traversal prevention, command obfuscation
  normalization, OOM guards, fast-lane policy enforcement
- Provider improvements: zero-copy OpenAI serialization, empty-base-URL
  defaults, Gemini/Vertex unknown part resilience
- Agent loop: multi-source message fetchers, queue bounds, error
  persistence fixes
- Session: batched index updates, RawValue frame serialization, partial
  hydration tracking
- Tools: correct trailing-newline truncation semantics, DoS guard
- Hostcall: log-sinking batch planner, generation-keyed ghost cache,
  FIFO scheduler
- SSE: buffer overflow limits, incomplete UTF-8 handling
- Installer: remove auto-hook injection, add legacy cleanup
- 9 new regression tests covering security fixes and edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "pi_agent_rust"
-version = "0.1.3"
+version = "0.1.4"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "High-performance AI coding agent CLI - Rust port of Pi Agent"
